name: Item
description: Generic list/menu item molecule. Composes ItemMedia + ItemContent + optional Actions (Button reference). First PoC with CROSS-BUNDLE composition (uses Button from poc-button bundle as Actions slot).

exposedProps.name: swapHeader
exposedProps.description: Custom header slot content. Second PoC INSTANCE_SWAP after Field's inputType.

slots.name: actions
slots.$crossBundle: First PoC instance of cross-bundle composition. Actions slot embeds Apollo v2 Button atom.

$itemMediaSubComponent.$role: 32×32 frame containing a Lucide icon. Default: Folder icon.

flex.$role: Horizontal row holding media + content + actions

Default.$tbdStep3: size=default walked; sm/xs not walked but uniform dimensions

Muted.$role: Adds muted fill (likely base/muted) around container

size-axis.sm: 460×64 (same dimensions; differs in internal padding/spacing TBD)

uses.name: Button
uses.$role: Actions slot default — first cross-bundle composition

a11y.role: TBD (depends on usage — list item, menu item, link, etc.)
a11y.preferredElement: <li> in lists; <button> if interactive; <a> if navigation
a11y.$comment: Item is a generic surface — a11y role determined by consumer context.

$new_audit_findings.F28: NEW (LOW). Item title uses `line-height/leading-4` (16px) — tighter than `text-sm/line-height` (20px) used elsewhere. Distinguishes title from description visually. Documented; not a bug.
$new_audit_findings.F29: NEW (DOC). First cross-bundle composition — Item.Actions defaults to Button.variant=Outline. Renderer must resolve cross-bundle references; bundle index needs to declare both bundles loaded.

$v0_4_0_candidates.SP-13: Cross-bundle composition reference (NEW). Item uses Button.variant=Outline by reference. Bundle needs $crossBundle declarations + resolution rules. Could be HIGH if Apollo's molecule batch reveals more cross-references.
$v0_4_0_candidates.SP-12 (carried): Actions slot may need INSTANCE_SET if multiple buttons commonly render. Currently shows 1 Button default.

$step2_known_gaps.field: sm vs xs size internal differences
Header slot with swapHeader instance-swap behavior
